Become a PowerPlatform
Admin in 4 weeks.

Expand your skills with our PowerPlatform course.
From user to expert in 4 weeks. Secure your place now and get started.

These are the contents of our workshop

Efficient management
of the PowerPlatform

Learn the key elements of effective PowerPlatform management. We cover topics from environment configuration to security management that will make you a competent administrator.

Security strategies
in practice

This part of the workshop is dedicated to security best practices and policies on the PowerPlatform. Find out how to protect your data and successfully implement compliance policies.

Governance for beginners & advanced

Develop your PowerPlatform governance skills. We'll teach you advanced techniques for monitoring, logging, and deploying effective policies.

Michael Roth

Knowledge mediator 

Michael, an authority in PowerPlatform governance, who leads this dynamic course. With deep insights, Michael will guide you through the complex aspects of governance and security in PowerPlatform. His hands-on approach is designed to make you a proficient PowerPlatform admin in just 4 weeks.

FAQ

  • Is registration binding?

Yes, registration is binding, but can be canceled up to 9 days before the course starts

  • Are there any prerequisites for taking the course?

There are no explicit prerequisites for taking the course. However, knowledge of PL-900 (Power Platform Fundamentals) is an advantage.

  • How much time will the course take?

The course consists of 4 weeks with 2 hours of online workshops each. There is also optional homework.

  • Can I only take part in part of the course?

In general, it is recommended that you attend all sessions to get the full benefit from the course, but it is up to the participant whether they attend all sessions.

  • Is there a certification after completing the course

Yes, upon successful completion of the course, participants will receive a certificate confirming their knowledge and skills as a Power Platform Administrator.

  • Is there an opportunity to ask questions during the course?

Yes, the workshop is planned to be interactive, which means that you can ask questions directly to the course leaders. There is also a platform for exchange and support among the participants.

  • How can I pay for the course?

Payment is made in advance online using the payment options offered on our website.

  • How can I pay for the course?

Payment is made in advance online using the payment options offered on our website.

  • Are there any discounts or special offers?

Yes, there are early bird and group discounts (upon request) as well as a 10% discount if you fill out our feedback form by mid-August.

  • What content is covered in the course?

The course covers the following topics:

  • Introduction and presentation: Overview of Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI, and Power Virtual Agents.

  • Tasks of a Power Platform Administrator: From setup to monitoring and maintenance.

  • Tenant settings: optimal configuration and management.

  • Environments: Setting up and managing environments, best practices.

  • Data Loss Prevention (DLP): Protecting data and implementing DLP policies.

  • Security aspects: authentication, authorization and user access.

  • Monitoring: Monitoring performance and availability.

  • Nurturing and support: support and training of users.

As a Microsoft MVP and Power Platform specialist, I support SMEs in their digital transformation. My expertise in low-code solutions, process automation and business process management helps you achieve your business goals more efficiently.
